meta.notes: General IT profile. Use timowen.me/it. Tailor skillGroups order and experience bullets per role before generating docx.

header.name: Timothy J. Owen, D.M.A.
header.subtitle: U.S. Army Veteran (20 Years) · Active Federal Secret Clearance · South Puget Sound, WA

objective: Retired 20-year U.S. Army veteran with an active federal Secret-level security clearance, transitioning to Information Technology. Completed two consecutive 16-week Washington Vets-to-Tech intensive programs (Server & Cloud Applications, Aug 2025; Cybersecurity, Dec 2025) and a government IT internship at the Washington State Department of Licensing, earning CompTIA Network+, AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner, Foundational C#, and PCEP certifications. Brings documented discipline in compliance, technical documentation, and operations from two decades of military service.

transferableSkills.title: Analytical Thinking
transferableSkills.description: Designed assessment rubrics and practice systems grounded in data — directly applicable to IT troubleshooting workflows and process optimization.

transferableSkills.title: Automation
transferableSkills.description: Built Python tools (Subnet Calculator, VA Ratings Calculator, Tempo Finder) using algorithmic problem-solving relevant to IT scripting and infrastructure support.

transferableSkills.title: Adaptability
transferableSkills.description: Sustained mission-critical operations across 20 years of military service and rapid IT upskilling — translatable to dynamic, fast-moving technical environments.

transferableSkills.title: Organization
transferableSkills.description: Managed HR, security clearances, library operations, and large equipment inventory — directly applicable to IT asset and data management.

bullets: Diagnosed and resolved three network connectivity failures by tracing physical connections through patch panels and verifying switch port assignments, working in mixed supervised and independent capacity.
Executed IT service requests in a regulated government environment, maintaining procedural compliance and detailed documentation throughout.
Communicated technical requirements clearly to internal stakeholders with varying technical backgrounds.
Operated within a strict state data privacy compliance framework across the full engagement.
Completed 16-week intensive program earning 18 college credits toward a B.S. in Computer Science; 100% lab completion rate.
Applied security hardening, threat intelligence, and vulnerability assessment techniques across coursework in CSC 325, CSC 364, CSC 426, and CSC 455.
Implemented multi-factor authentication and TLS encryption in lab environments; applied HIPAA compliance standards for clinical data scenarios.
Participated in three professional development sessions on server hardware, including blade removal, disassembly, and reinstallation, under instructor direction.
Completed 16-week intensive program earning 18 college credits toward a B.S. in Computer Science; 100% lab completion rate.
Configured network environments across IPv4/IPv6, subnetting, and VPN in hands-on labs.
Deployed AWS EC2 applications; automated infrastructure tasks with Ansible; administered Linux and Windows Server via Bash and PowerShell.
Developed Python scripting skills through automation and data analysis exercises.
Sustained mission-critical operations across 400+ high-stakes engagements for audiences totaling 2.5M+, with 100% readiness.
Managed large equipment inventory across all assignments with zero discrepancy.
Administered federal security clearance compliance records for 40+ personnel, maintaining accuracy and currency throughout.
Certified 200 personnel as Master Resilience Trainers across 10 cohorts as a Level 2 Facilitator.
Instructed 100+ new trainees and 20 mid-level leaders; achieved 100% student pass rate.
Advised 40 senior leaders as subject-matter expert in field assessment administration.
Contributed to curriculum and policy redesign for a career field of 5,000+ personnel, resulting in a 58% reduction in training cycle time.
Maintained training and administrative records for a staff and faculty of 80 personnel.
Earned Distinguished Leader Award, Army Leadership Development Program (2010).
Participated in 120–150 performances and engagements across 60 international assignments; deployed in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom (2007).
Managed HR administration and library operations for 40+ personnel, enforcing documentation accuracy and compliance.
Earned promotion to Sergeant (E-5) in 2008.

projects.title: Subnet Calculator
projects.description: Python tool automating IPv4 subnet calculations for network troubleshooting and study. Demonstrates scripting, documentation, and process optimization.

projects.title: VA Ratings Calculator
projects.description: Python tool automating VA disability ratings calculations, demonstrating scripting, data processing, and veteran-focused problem solving.

projects.title: Tempo Finder
projects.description: Binary-search algorithm identifying optimal practice tempos (30–240 BPM) at O(log n) efficiency. Showcases algorithmic problem-solving and user-focused design.

projects.title: Music Practice SRS
projects.description: Anki-based spaced repetition system for saxophone practice. Applied SuperMemo scheduling principles to automated scale and pattern generation.

additional.label: Typing
additional.text: Approximately 60 WPM; 10-key at 5,280 net KPH (94.6% accuracy). Include only for banking or data-entry roles.
